footer.tagline: Print Error-Free Cheques in Under 2 Minutes

hero.headline: Print Error-Free Cheques in Under 2 Minutes
hero.subheadline: Print, track, and manage cheques from any device. Works with 300+ Indian banks. No training needed — just sign up and print.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free forever for basic use.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Description: Enter payee details, amount, and select your bank. Cheqify formats everything automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: Print on any standard cheque leaf using your regular printer. Error-free, every time.
